source-layers.sql: SELECT the_geom_webmercator, cartodb_id, route FROM mta_lirr_rail_lines
SELECT the_geom_webmercator, cartodb_id, route_name FROM mta_metronorth_rail_lines
SELECT cartodb_id as station_envelope_id, the_geom_webmercator, stat_name as station_name FROM mta_nyc_rail_station_envelope_dissolve
SELECT ST_PointOnSurface(the_geom_webmercator) as the_geom_webmercator, stat_name as station_name FROM mta_nyc_rail_station_envelope_dissolve

meta.description: NYC and Regional Transit Lines and Stops - Originally Sourced from NYC DoITT GIS, combined with SI Railway data from Baruch College NYC Mass Transit Spatial Layers | Subway entrances from NYC Open Data
